title: Trigger automation when a new board is created from a template
excerpt: How can I configure an event (automation) or an API hook to execute for each line when the board is created?

posts.author: TheKribus (Michael Kribus)
posts.cookedHtml: How can I configure an event (automation) or an API hook to execute for each line when the board is created?

posts.author: andrewp (Andrzej P)
posts.cookedHtml: @TheKribus, could you elaborate on what you would like to do with each of these newly created lines?

posts.author: JoseDaher (Jose Daher)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi! Happy new year!

Do you need automation per line in the “old” board (the one that creates other boards from the template) or for the each line in the “new” board, created from the template?

The solution is “the same”, but if it is in the new board, the automation has to be setup in the template.

Hope it helps!

See ya,
